message:
feat: add updated_before/updated_after filters to search_issues

The `list_issues` path already supported date-range filtering via
`updated_before` and `updated_after` on `ListFilters`, but
`search_issues` (the full-text search path) did not apply those
filters. This meant that `br search --updated-before ...` silently
ignored the date constraint, returning results outside the window.

Two new SQL clauses are now appended when the corresponding filter
fields are set, using the same `<=` / `>=` semantics as list_issues.
Timestamps are serialized via `to_rfc3339()` for consistent SQLite
comparison.

A dedicated test exercises both filters against three issues with
10-day-apart timestamps, verifying boundary inclusion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
